description: Bot container run profiler — step latency breakdown, signal eval cost, push update cost, step trace buffer health, telemetry pipeline, and BotLens backend. Set the time range to cover the full run duration. Filter by run_id to focus on a single run.

panels.title: Run Status
panels.description: Current status of the selected run from portal_bot_runs.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(status, 'unknown') AS value FROM portal_bot_runs WHERE run_id = '${run_id}' LIMIT 1;

panels.title: Run Duration (min)
panels.description: Elapsed minutes from started_at to ended_at (or now if still running).

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (COALESCE(ended_at, now()) - started_at)) / 60.0, 1)::double precision AS value FROM portal_bot_runs WHERE run_id = '${run_id}' LIMIT 1;

panels.title: Total Bars Processed
panels.description: Count of step_series_state entries for this run in the selected time window.

targets.rawSql: SELECT count(*)::double precision AS value FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND run_id = '${run_id}' AND step_name = 'step_series_state' AND ('${symbol:raw}' = '__all' OR symbol = '${symbol:raw}') AND ('${timeframe:raw}' = '__all' OR timeframe = '${timeframe:raw}');

panels.title: Bars / sec
panels.description: Effective throughput: bars processed per second across the selected time window.

targets.rawSql: WITH s AS ( SELECT count(*)::double precision AS bars, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (max(started_at) - min(started_at)))::double precision AS span_s FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND run_id = '${run_id}' AND step_name = 'step_series_state' AND ('${symbol:raw}' = '__all' OR symbol = '${symbol:raw}') AND ('${timeframe:raw}' = '__all' OR timeframe = '${timeframe:raw}') ) SELECT CASE WHEN COALESCE(span_s, 0) <= 0 THEN NULL ELSE bars / span_s END AS value FROM s;

panels.title: Failed Steps
panels.description: Count of step trace entries where ok=false. Any value above zero warrants investigation.

targets.rawSql: SELECT count(*)::double precision AS value FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND run_id = '${run_id}' AND NOT ok AND ('${symbol:raw}' = '__all' OR symbol = '${symbol:raw}');

panels.title: Trace Drops
panels.description: Sum of step_trace_dropped_count from step_finalize_bar context. Non-zero means step trace entries were lost due to buffer overflow.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(NULLIF(context->>'step_trace_dropped_count','')::double precision), 0)::double precision AS value FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND run_id = '${run_id}' AND step_name = 'step_finalize_bar' AND (context->>'step_trace_dropped_count') IS NOT NULL;

panels.title: Step Latency Table — p50 / p95 / p99 / max
panels.description: All step names for the run, sorted by p95 descending. The top row is your hotspot. 'samples' reflects 1% step sampling rate — multiply by ~100 for true bar count.

targets.rawSql: SELECT step_name, count(*) AS samples, round(avg(duration_ms)::numeric, 2) AS avg_ms, round(percentile_cont(0.50) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY duration_ms)::numeric, 2) AS p50_ms, round(percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY duration_ms)::numeric, 2) AS p95_ms, round(percentile_cont(0.99) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY duration_ms)::numeric, 2) AS p99_ms, round(max(duration_ms)::numeric, 2) AS max_ms, count(*) FILTER (WHERE NOT ok) AS errors FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND run_id = '${run_id}' AND ('${symbol:raw}' = '__all' OR symbol = '${symbol:raw}') AND ('${timeframe:raw}' = '__all' OR timeframe = '${timeframe:raw}') GROUP BY step_name ORDER BY p95_ms DESC NULLS LAST;

panels.title: All Steps — p95 Over Time
panels.description: One line per step_name. Use this to spot which step degraded during a specific time window of the run.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(started_at, $__interval), step_name AS metric, percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY duration_ms)::double precision AS value FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND run_id = '${run_id}' AND ('${symbol:raw}' = '__all' OR symbol = '${symbol:raw}') GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1;

panels.title: step_series_state — p95 by Symbol
panels.description: Per-symbol bar processing latency. The symbol with the highest p95 is your hot series.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(started_at, $__interval), concat(COALESCE(symbol,'?'), '|', COALESCE(timeframe,'?')) AS metric, percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY duration_ms)::double precision AS value FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND run_id = '${run_id}' AND step_name = 'step_series_state' GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1;

panels.title: Signal Eval — Total vs Overlay Projection (p95)
panels.description: step_signal_eval total duration vs the overlay_projection_ms sub-cost. If overlay_proj is close to total, overlays are the bottleneck inside signal eval.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(started_at, $__interval), 'signal_eval_p95' AS metric, percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY duration_ms)::double precision AS value FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND run_id = '${run_id}' AND step_name = 'step_signal_eval' AND ('${symbol:raw}' = '__all' OR symbol = '${symbol:raw}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(started_at, $__interval), 'overlay_proj_p95' AS metric, percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY NULLIF(context->>'overlay_projection_ms','')::double precision)::double precision AS value FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND run_id = '${run_id}' AND step_name = 'step_signal_eval' AND (context->>'overlay_projection_ms') IS NOT NULL AND ('${symbol:raw}' = '__all' OR symbol = '${symbol:raw}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

panels.title: step_push_update — p95 by Symbol
panels.description: Time to build and push the WS state update to the backend per bar, split by symbol. High values indicate push serialization or network cost.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(started_at, $__interval), COALESCE(symbol, '?') AS metric, percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY duration_ms)::double precision AS value FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND run_id = '${run_id}' AND step_name = 'step_push_update' AND ('${symbol:raw}' = '__all' OR symbol = '${symbol:raw}') GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1;

panels.title: Trace Buffer Queue Depth
panels.description: step_trace_queue_depth from step_finalize_bar context. Sustained high values mean the buffer is filling faster than it flushes — drops will follow.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(started_at, $__interval), 'queue_depth' AS metric, avg(NULLIF(context->>'step_trace_queue_depth','')::double precision)::double precision AS value FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND run_id = '${run_id}' AND step_name = 'step_finalize_bar' AND (context->>'step_trace_queue_depth') IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

panels.title: Trace Persist Lag & Batch Duration
panels.description: step_trace_persist_lag_ms (time from step trace enqueue to DB write) and step_trace_persist_batch_ms (batch write duration). Rising lag means the writer can't keep up.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(started_at, $__interval), 'persist_lag_ms' AS metric, avg(NULLIF(context->>'step_trace_persist_lag_ms','')::double precision)::double precision AS value FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND run_id = '${run_id}' AND step_name = 'step_finalize_bar' AND (context->>'step_trace_persist_lag_ms') IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(started_at, $__interval), 'batch_write_ms' AS metric, avg(NULLIF(context->>'step_trace_persist_batch_ms','')::double precision)::double precision AS value FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND run_id = '${run_id}' AND step_name = 'step_finalize_bar' AND (context->>'step_trace_persist_batch_ms') IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

panels.title: Trace Enqueue Time (step_trace_enqueue_ms)
panels.description: Time the runtime spends handing a step trace entry to the background buffer. Should be sub-millisecond. Spikes mean buffer contention.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(started_at, $__interval), 'enqueue_ms_p95' AS metric, percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY NULLIF(context->>'step_trace_enqueue_ms','')::double precision)::double precision AS value FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND run_id = '${run_id}' AND step_name IN ('step_series_state','step_finalize_bar') AND (context->>'step_trace_enqueue_ms') IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

panels.title: Telemetry Send Latency — p95 (ms)
panels.description: From Loki: bot_telemetry_send_succeeded send_ms. Time for the container to synchronously push one payload to the backend WS endpoint. High values indicate network or backend pressure.

panels.title: Emit Queue Wait — p95 (ms)
panels.description: From Loki: bot_telemetry_emit_dequeued queue_wait_ms. Time a payload spent waiting in the emit queue before being sent. Rising values mean the sender thread is falling behind.

panels.title: Backpressure Events & Send Failures
panels.description: From Loki: bot_telemetry_emit_queue_backpressure (queue full, payload dropped at enqueue) and bot_telemetry_send_failed (WS send error). Either non-zero means data loss.

panels.title: BotLens Ingest — Process Time p95 (ms)
panels.description: From Loki: botlens_ingest_processed process_ms. Time the backend spends applying one ingest payload (fact batch / bootstrap) to in-memory state and fanout. High values stall the ingest queue.

panels.title: BotLens Ingest Queue Depth
panels.description: From Loki: botlens_ingest_processed queue_depth. How many payloads are waiting when each one is processed. Sustained depth > 0 means the async ingest loop is behind.

panels.title: WS Viewer Count
panels.description: From Loki: botlens_stream_broadcast viewer_count per broadcast. viewer_count=0 during a backtest is expected.

panels.title: Step Trace Persist Failures
panels.description: From Loki: bot_run_step_persist_failed for this run. Each entry is a step trace row that failed to write to portal_bot_run_steps — the hotspot table may be missing data.

panels.title: BotLens Ingest Errors & Warnings
panels.description: From Loki: WARNING or ERROR log lines related to botlens for this run. Covers state fanout failures, DB write errors, and WS disconnect events.

list.name: bot_id
list.label: Bot
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT bot_id FROM portal_bot_runs WHERE bot_id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY 1
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT bot_id FROM portal_bot_runs WHERE bot_id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY 1

list.name: run_id
list.label: Run
list.definition: SELECT run_id || ' (' || COALESCE(status,'?') || ' ' || to_char(started_at,'MM-DD HH24:MI') || ')' AS __text, run_id AS __value FROM portal_bot_runs WHERE ('${bot_id:raw}' = '__all' OR bot_id = '${bot_id:raw}') ORDER BY started_at DESC LIMIT 100
list.query: SELECT run_id || ' (' || COALESCE(status,'?') || ' ' || to_char(started_at,'MM-DD HH24:MI') || ')' AS __text, run_id AS __value FROM portal_bot_runs WHERE ('${bot_id:raw}' = '__all' OR bot_id = '${bot_id:raw}') ORDER BY started_at DESC LIMIT 100

list.name: symbol
list.label: Symbol
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT symbol FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE run_id = '${run_id}' AND symbol IS NOT NULL ORDER BY 1
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT symbol FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE run_id = '${run_id}' AND symbol IS NOT NULL ORDER BY 1

list.name: timeframe
list.label: Timeframe
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT timeframe FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE run_id = '${run_id}' AND timeframe IS NOT NULL ORDER BY 1
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT timeframe FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE run_id = '${run_id}' AND timeframe IS NOT NULL ORDER BY 1

title: Bot Container Run Profiler
